name: L-4 extract-patterns records a verbatim quote from the underlying review comment per the architecture verbatim-quote enforcement
command: printf '%s' '{"number":1,"comments":[{"body":"please add null check before dereferencing"}]}' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/extract-patterns.sh" --pr pr.json --out patterns.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const a=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("patterns.json","utf8"));process.exit(a[0].verbatim_quote==="please add null check before dereferencing"?0:1)' && echo verbatim 1>&2
